description: A client wants to donate appreciated stock to a charity to be more tax-efficient.

nodes.task_description: Identify highly appreciated, long-term holdings in the client's portfolio.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a stock that has significant unrealized capital gains.

nodes.task_description: Explain the tax benefits of donating appreciated stock directly versus selling it and donating the cash.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains how donating the stock avoids capital gains tax.

nodes.task_description: Facilitate the transfer of the shares from the client's account to the charity's brokerage account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent processes the transfer of shares to the designated charity.
